title: 1Password vs Appwrite
description: Compare 1Password vs Appwrite — a security & compliance platform versus a developer tools solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: 1Password (Security & Compliance) and Appwrite (Developer Tools) serve different primary purposes. 1Password has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is security & compliance or developer tools capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between 1Password and Appwrite?
faqs.answer: 1Password is a security & compliance tool, while Appwrite is a developer tools platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can 1Password replace Appwrite?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, 1Password or Appwrite?
faqs.answer: 1Password ($7.99/mo per user) and Appwrite (Free – $15/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
